title: HTML Fixer: Drag-and-drop DropZoneWidget
original_text:
Changes made:

Added imports — QDragEnterEvent, QDropEvent, Qt, QHBoxLayout, and QFrame from the correct PyQt 6 modules. os was also added because it is now used directly in open_dropped_file.

New class: DropZoneWidget — A QFrame with a gray dotted border, light background, text "Drag and drop files", "or", and an Upload button with a teal gradient. It has setAcceptDrops(False) to prevent it from intercepting drop events.

setAcceptDrops(True) in HtmlFixerApp.__init__ so that the main window captures drops.

Logic refactored — The processing logic was moved to _process_path(filepath). Both the Upload button and the drag and drop function call this same method without duplicating code.

The drag and drop methods dragEnterEvent, dragMoveEvent, dropEvent, and open_dropped_file have been added to HtmlFixerApp. The latter validates that the file exists and is .html/.htm, displaying QMessageBox.warning if it is invalid and QMessageBox.critical if an error occurs while processing it.
expected_subject: feat(ui): add drag-and-drop support with DropZoneWidget
expected_body_lines: - Implement DropZoneWidget with dashed border and gradient button
- Refactor processing logic into shared _process_path() method
- Add validation for .html/.htm files with error feedback dialogs
- Import required PyQt6 modules for drag-and-drop support
expected_command: git commit -m "feat(ui): add drag-and-drop support with DropZoneWidget"
